message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive authentication flow E2E tests (brenner_bot-4p0m)

Add e2e/authentication.spec.ts with 17 tests covering:
- Protected route access (sessions/* returns 404 without auth)
- Protected API access (api/sessions, api/experiments return 404)
- Public route access (corpus, distillations, method accessible)
- Session cookie authentication (lab secret via cookie)
- Session persistence (across navigation and refresh)
- Graceful degradation (helpful messages when locked)
- Mixed content access (navigating between protected/public)

All tests pass against production (brennerbot.org) where lab mode is disabled,
verifying fail-closed security behavior.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
